steps.title: Compare possible daily intake
steps.content: The passage says baleen whales can eat up to 30 percent of their mass per day. A sei whale can weigh as much as 25,000 kg, so its possible daily intake is up to 7,500 kg, while the bowhead whale can consume 19,800 kg per day.

steps.title: Reject unsupported whale claims
steps.content: Choice A says sei whales are less likely to eat krill, which is not stated. Choice B gives the same maximum to both whales. Choice D invents food competition. The remaining choice follows from the numbers: the bowhead can eat more krill per day. The answer is C.
